questionHtml:
A DNA triplet on the strand that is transcribed has the bases TAG. Which anticodon on tRNA is used in translation?

A.  AUC

B.  UAG

C.  TAG

D.  ATC

meta.title: A DNA triplet on the strand that is transcribed has the bases TAG. Which anticodon on tRNA is used in translation? A. AUC B. UAG C. TAG D. ATC
breadcrumbLabels: D1.2.7. Complementary base pairing between tRNA and mRNA
